text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tenno Sho! Spring! Hark, with what majesty these
words toll!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This race I have long striven for is the first
spectacular event of my senior year. What could
be more fitting?
choice_data_list: Yeah, it carries a lot of influence.
Yeah, it carries a lot of influence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Influence... Yes, the one thing I do not have at
the moment.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I lack influence. Even with my abilities, overlordly as they are, there remain those reluctant to serve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I shall establish my brand and acquire great
influence through a fine victory in this legendary
race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once achieved, even the most stubborn of the
old order believers will have no choice but to
admit that I am their new lord.
choice_data_list: You've got a lot on your plate, huh?
You've got a lot on your plate, huh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but that is what makes being the Overlord so
divine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
After this spring Tenno Sho, the heroes of the
previous generation, as well as Doto, will be
awaiting my challenge.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But today, I have only one rival—that unseen foe
by the name of "influence"!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I, the soon-to-be Centurial Overlord, will not
falter.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Observe, as I take the hand of those stubborn old
fools in a marvelous ensemble performance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With dignified steps, T.M. Opera O struts away
toward the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This distinguished race will test whether she is a
true ruler or not.
